data.title: IMF Calls for Global Stablecoin Standards
data.description:
The IMF released a report on stablecoins. It highlights benefits for payments and risks to stability. Global standards are needed for reserves and supervision.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/imf-global-stablecoin-standards-risks-2025

data.title: Bond market crashes Japan’s $137 billion stimulus plans and the launch of Sanaenomics
data.description:
Japan's bond market selloff pushed yields to a 16-year high, threatening funding for Sanae Takaichi’s $137B stimulus.

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-12-05)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $3.18T, up by 1.02% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $90,889 and $93,605 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $91,310, down by -2.22%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include CVC, LUNC, and DCR, up by 36%, 30%, and 12%, respectively.

Top stories of the day:

Ethereum's Fusaka Upgrade Promises Cost Reduction and Efficiency Enhancement

Upcoming PCE Data Release to Guide Federal Reserve's December Meeting

Federal Reserve Expected to Lower Interest Rates Amid Weak Labor Market

Bitcoin's Future Performance Faces Challenges, Says 21Shares Co-Founder

Italy Initiates Comprehensive Review of Cryptocurrency Investment Risk Controls

U.S. Core PCE Price Index for September to Be Released

XRP Spot ETFs See Significant Inflows on December 4

U.S. Sovereign Debt Surpasses $30 Trillion for the First Time

CZ Outlines Bitcoin’s Real-World Utility as Peter Schiff Defends Gold in High-Stakes Debate at Binance Blockchain Week Dubai

data.title: Cryptocurrency Prices May Have Bottomed, Says Bitmine Chairman
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Bitmine Chairman Tom Lee has suggested that cryptocurrency prices may have reached their lowest point. He believes that the best period for growth is yet to come, with the potential for a 200-fold increase in the future.

data.title: Italy orders non-compliant VASPs to exit as MiCAR rules kick in
data.description:
Consob has urged VASPs to secure CASP approval or shut down by December 30, 2025. This comes as the deadline for transitioning to new MiCAR policies approaches. Unauthorised operators will halt their services and return user assets
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/italy-orders-non-compliant-vasps-to-exit-as-micar-rules-kick-in/

data.title: Second-largest Russian bank set to launch bitcoin spot trading in 2026
data.description:
The Russian banking giant VTB is preparing to offer clients spot trading services for bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies.
source: https://atlas21.com/second-largest-russian-bank-set-to-launch-bitcoin-spot-trading-in-2026/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=second-largest-russian-bank-set-to-launch-bitcoin-spot-trading-in-2026

data.title: Whale Stakes 24,000 ETH After Five Months, Profits $15.2 Million
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Onchain Lens has reported that a whale has staked 24,000 ETH after holding it for five months. The value of the staked ETH is approximately $75.94 million. The whale initially purchased these ETH for $60.7 million USDC, resulting in a profit of $15.2 million.

data.title: Large Ethereum Transfer to Everstake Raises Attention
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham reveals that at 16:42, a total of 23,999 ETH was transferred from an anonymous address, beginning with 0x4825, to Everstake. This significant movement of Ethereum has caught the attention of the crypto community.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/33297536587490?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Binance Alpha to Feature Power Protocol (POWER), Airdrop 375 POWER Tokens to Eligible Users
data.description: Binance announced on X that Binance Alpha will feature Power Protocol (POWER), with Alpha trading opening on December 5, 2025, at 10:00 (UTC).Once trading begins, users with at least 245 Binance Alpha Points can claim an airdrop of 375 POWER tokens on a first-come, first-served basis. If the reward pool is not fully distributed, the score threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every 5 minutes.Claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claims on the Alpha Events page within 24 hours; otherwise, it will be deemed that users have given up claiming the airdrop.

data.title: Solana Protocols Face Outages Due to Cloudflare Disruption
data.description: According to PANews, a significant service disruption at Cloudflare has led to user interface outages for several major Solana protocols, including Jupiter, Raydium, and Meteora. The incident has affected the accessibility of these platforms, causing inconvenience for users.

data.title: BlackRock's Bitcoin Trust Experiences Prolonged Withdrawals Amid Stable BTC Prices
data.description: According to Foresight News, Bloomberg reports that BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust Fund has seen its longest streak of weekly withdrawals since its launch in January 2024. Despite stable Bitcoin prices, institutional demand for BTC remains subdued. Data compiled by Bloomberg indicates that over $2.7 billion has been withdrawn from the exchange-traded fund (ETF) over the five weeks leading up to November 28. On Thursday, an additional $113 million was redeemed, suggesting the ETF is heading towards a sixth consecutive week of net outflows.

data.title: Bunni Attacker Deposits 2295.8 ETH into TornadoCash
data.description: According to BlockBeats, an address linked to the Bunni attacker has deposited 2295.8 ETH into TornadoCash. This transaction follows a previous incident on September 2, when the Bunni team suffered a vulnerability attack resulting in a loss of approximately $8.4 million. The team has since announced plans to disband in October.

data.title: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse Predicts Bitcoin Will Hit 180K by 2026
data.description:
Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse predicts Bitcoin will hit $180,000 by the end of 2026, citing upcoming U. S. regulatory progress as a key catalyst.

The post Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse Predicts Bitcoin Will Hit 180K by 2026 first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/12/05/ripple-ceo-bitcoin-180-k-2026/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=ripple-ceo-bitcoin-180-k-2026

data.title: IMF Pushes for Global Standards to Harness Stablecoin Benefits Safely
data.description:
The International Monetary Fund has released a new assessment arguing that stablecoins could play a far larger role in the global financial system - if they are brought under consistent and well-designed regulation.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/imf-pushes-for-global-standards-to-harness-stablecoin-benefits-safely/
